from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F, types as T
import uuid

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk"
elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    storage_account_name = "pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz"
else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace: {workspace}")

mpesc_base_path = f"abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net"

print("Workspace:", workspace)
print("Base:", mpesc_base_path)

EVENT_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Event_95506"
CASE_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_95498"
DOC_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_Document_Dates_95500"
CASES_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"
CASE_DATES_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Case_Dates_95499"


case_dates = spark.read.option("header", True).option("sep", "|").csv(CASE_DATES_PATH)
events = spark.read.option("header", True).option("sep", "|").csv(EVENT_PATH)
cases = spark.read.option("header", True).csv(CASES_PATH)
case_proc = spark.read.option("header", True).option("sep", "|").csv(CASE_PATH)
doc_dates = spark.read.option("header", True).option("sep", "|").csv(DOC_PATH)

print("Loaded")

event_case_key = "ParentKeyID" if "ParentKeyID" in events.columns else "ID"

events_clean = (
    events
    .withColumn("legacyCaseId", F.trim(F.col(event_case_key)))
    .withColumn("legacyEventId", F.col("ID"))
    .join(cases_map, "legacyCaseId")
    .select(
        "legacyCaseId","caseId","legacyEventId",
        clean(F.col("25")).alias("typeOfEvent_raw"),
        clean(F.col("26")).alias("chartStatus_raw"),
        clean(F.col("30")).alias("line1"),
        clean(F.col("31")).alias("line2"),
        clean(F.col("32")).alias("town"),
        clean(F.col("42")).alias("county"),
        clean(F.col("33")).alias("postcode"),
        clean(F.col("35")).alias("startDate"),
        clean(F.col("36")).alias("startTime"),
        clean(F.col("37")).alias("endDate"),
        clean(F.col("43")).alias("prep"),
        clean(F.col("44")).alias("sit"),
        clean(F.col("45")).alias("rep"),
    )

events_clean = (
    events_clean
    .withColumn("startDate_ts", parse_dt(F.col("startDate")))
    .withColumn("endDate_ts", parse_dt(F.col("endDate")))
    .withColumn("siteVisitDate", F.col("startDate_ts"))
    .withColumn(
        "venueKey",
        F.concat_ws(
            "|",
            F.coalesce(F.lower(F.trim(F.col("line1"))), F.lit("")),
            F.coalesce(F.lower(F.trim(F.col("line2"))), F.lit("")),
            F.coalesce(F.lower(F.trim(F.col("town"))), F.lit("")),
            F.coalesce(F.lower(F.trim(F.col("county"))), F.lit("")),
            F.coalesce(F.lower(F.trim(F.col("postcode"))), F.lit(""))
        )
    )
    .withColumn(
        "venueGuid",
        F.when(
            (F.trim(F.col("venueKey")) != "") &
            (
                F.col("line1").isNotNull() |
                F.col("line2").isNotNull() |
                F.col("town").isNotNull() |
                F.col("county").isNotNull() |
                F.col("postcode").isNotNull()
            ),
            uuid5_from_text(F.col("venueKey"))
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )

type_lc = F.lower("typeOfEvent_raw")
status_lc = F.lower("chartStatus_raw")

events_mapped = (
    events_clean
    .withColumn(
        "eventProcedureTypeId",
        F.when(type_lc.rlike("hearing"), "hearing")
         .when(type_lc.rlike("inquiry"), "inquiry")
         .when(type_lc.rlike("site"), "site-visit")
         .when(type_lc.rlike("written"), "written-reps")
         .when(type_lc.rlike("in-house"), "admin-in-house")
    )
    .withColumn(
        "procedureStatusId",
        F.when(status_lc.contains("confirm"), "active")
         .when(status_lc.contains("new"), "active")
         .when(status_lc.contains("re"), "active")
         .otherwise(None)
    )
    .withColumn(
        "siteVisitTypeId",
        F.when(type_lc.contains("un-accompanied"), "usv")
         .when(type_lc.contains("accompanied"), "asv")
    )

doc_dates_clean = (
    doc_dates
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        parse_dt(clean(F.col("22"))).alias("statementsOfCaseReceivedDate"),
        F.greatest(
            parse_dt(clean(F.col("25"))),
            parse_dt(clean(F.col("27")))
        ).alias("proofsOfEvidenceReceivedDate")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyCaseId"])
    .alias("d")
)

case_dates_clean = (
    case_dates
    .select(
        F.trim(F.col("ID").cast("string")).alias("legacyCaseId"),
        parse_dt(clean(F.col("29"))).alias("caseOfficerVerificationDate"),
        parse_dt(clean(F.col("19"))).alias("offerForWrittenRepresentationsDate")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["legacyCaseId"])
    .alias("cd")

procedure_ready = (
    events_mapped.alias("e")
    .join(case_proc_map.alias("c"), on="legacyCaseId", how="left")
    .join(doc_dates_clean, on="legacyCaseId", how="left")
    .join(case_dates_clean, on="legacyCaseId", how="left")

    .withColumn(
        "procedureTypeId",
        F.coalesce(
            F.col("c.caseProcedureTypeId"),
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId")
        )
    )

    .select(
        F.col("e.caseId").cast("string").alias("caseId"),
        F.col("e.legacyCaseId").cast("string").alias("legacyCaseId"),
        F.col("e.legacyEventId").cast("string").alias("legacyEventId"),

        F.col("procedureTypeId").cast("string").alias("procedureTypeId"),
        F.col("e.procedureStatusId").cast("string").alias("procedureStatusId"),

        # ✅ FIXED MAPPINGS (FROM CASE_DATES)
        F.col("cd.caseOfficerVerificationDate").alias("caseOfficerVerificationDate"),
        F.col("cd.offerForWrittenRepresentationsDate").alias("offerForWrittenRepresentationsDate"),

        F.lit(None).cast("string").alias("inspectorId"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "site-visit",
            F.col("e.siteVisitDate")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")).alias("siteVisitDate"),

        F.col("e.siteVisitTypeId").cast("string").alias("siteVisitTypeId"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "hearing",
            F.col("e.startDate_ts")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")).alias("confirmedHearingDate"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "hearing",
            F.col("e.endDate_ts")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")).alias("hearingClosedDate"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "inquiry",
            F.col("e.startDate_ts")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")).alias("confirmedInquiryDate"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "inquiry",
            F.col("e.endDate_ts")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")).alias("inquiryClosedDate"),

        F.lit(None).cast("timestamp").alias("preInquiryMeetingDate"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "admin-in-house",
            F.col("e.startDate_ts")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("timestamp")).alias("inHouseDate"),

        # 🔥 DOC DATES
        F.col("d.statementsOfCaseReceivedDate").alias("statementsOfCaseReceivedDate"),
        F.col("d.proofsOfEvidenceReceivedDate").alias("proofsOfEvidenceReceivedDate"),

        # HEARING TIMES
        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "hearing",
            F.col("e.prep").cast("decimal(10,2)")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("decimal(10,2)")).alias("hearingPreparationTimeDays"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "hearing",
            F.col("e.sit").cast("decimal(10,2)")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("decimal(10,2)")).alias("hearingSittingTimeDays"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "hearing",
            F.col("e.rep").cast("decimal(10,2)")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("decimal(10,2)")).alias("hearingReportingTimeDays"),

        F.lit(None).cast("decimal(10,2)").alias("hearingTravelTimeDays"),
        F.lit(None).cast("boolean").alias("hearingInTarget"),

        # INQUIRY TIMES
        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "inquiry",
            F.col("e.prep").cast("decimal(10,2)")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("decimal(10,2)")).alias("inquiryPreparationTimeDays"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "inquiry",
            F.col("e.sit").cast("decimal(10,2)")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("decimal(10,2)")).alias("inquirySittingTimeDays"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "inquiry",
            F.col("e.rep").cast("decimal(10,2)")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("decimal(10,2)")).alias("inquiryReportingTimeDays"),

        F.lit(None).cast("decimal(10,2)").alias("inquiryTravelTimeDays"),
        F.lit(None).cast("boolean").alias("inquiryInTarget"),

        # VENUES
        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "hearing",
            F.col("e.venueGuid")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")).alias("hearingVenueId"),

        F.when(
            F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId") == "inquiry",
            F.col("e.venueGuid")
        ).otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")).alias("inquiryVenueId"),

        # DEBUG
        F.lit("1").cast("string").alias("step"),
        F.col("e.typeOfEvent_raw").alias("typeOfEvent_raw"),
        F.col("e.chartStatus_raw").alias("chartStatus_raw"),
        F.col("e.venueGuid").alias("venueGuid"),
        F.col("e.eventProcedureTypeId").alias("eventProcedureTypeId"),
        F.col("c.procedure_raw").alias("caseProcedure_raw")
    )
    .filter(F.col("procedureTypeId").isNotNull())

OUT_DIR = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Procedure"

procedure_ready.coalesce(1) \
    .write.mode("overwrite") \
    .option("header", "true") \
    .csv(OUT_DIR)

print("Wrote procedure to:", OUT_DIR)

venue_address_ready = (
    events_mapped
    .filter(F.col("venueGuid").isNotNull())
    .select(
        F.col("venueGuid").alias("id"),
        F.col("line1"),
        F.col("line2"),
        F.col("town").alias("townCity"),
        F.col("county"),
        F.col("postcode")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["id"])
)

OUT_ADDRESS_DIR = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/ProcedureAddress"

venue_address_ready.coalesce(1) \
    .write.mode("overwrite") \
    .option("header", "true") \
    .csv(OUT_ADDRESS_DIR)

print("Wrote venue addresses to:", OUT_ADDRESS_DIR)
